$schema: Machine-readable manifest of @abenson-slt/acme-design-system components. Kept hand-authored and in sync with src/. Intended for AI agents choosing how to use this library without reading full source.

components.name: Button
components.description: Triggers an action or event.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Shows a Spinner in place of the leading icon and disables the button.

components.notes: Use 'outline-inverse' (white border/text on transparent background) instead of 'outline' on dark or gradient surfaces (e.g. a gradient hero), where the purple outline variant lacks contrast.

components.name: Input
components.description: Single-line text input.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input.

components.name: Label
components.description: Accessible form label built on Radix Label. Use inside FormField or standalone with htmlFor.

components.name: FormField
components.description: Composes a Label + form control + hint/error message. Clones the single child element to inject id, aria-describedby, and invalid.

props.name: id
props.description: Required. Applied to the label's htmlFor and cloned onto the child control.

props.name: hint
props.description: Shown when there is no error.

props.name: error
props.description: Shown instead of hint; also sets invalid=true on the child.

props.name: children
props.description: Exactly one form control, e.g. <Input /> or <Textarea />.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Standalone loading spinner (SVG). Used internally by Button's isLoading state; also usable on its own.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Non-interactive status pill.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Like Badge but interactive/removable.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: If provided, renders a dismiss 'x' button.

props.name: removeLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the remove button. Defaults to 'Remove {children}'.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Image avatar with graceful fallback to initials derived from `name` if no src or the image fails to load.

props.name: name
props.description: Required. Used for alt text and derived initials.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-checkbox. Supports checked, indeterminate ('indeterminate'), and unchecked states.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-radio-group. Exports both Radio (item) and RadioGroup (root, required wrapper).

props.name: value
props.description: Required on Radio. Passed to the parent RadioGroup's onValueChange.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-switch.

components.name: Select
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-select. Exports Select (root), SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectItem, SelectSeparator.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-tooltip. Requires TooltipProvider mounted once (typically at app root), then Tooltip/TooltipTrigger/TooltipContent per instance.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-popover. Exports Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverAnchor, PopoverContent, PopoverClose.

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu. Exports DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuCheckboxItem, DropdownMenuRadioGroup, DropdownMenuRadioItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuSub, DropdownMenuSubTrigger, DropdownMenuSubContent, DropdownMenuGroup.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-dialog. Exports Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent (renders its own Portal + Overlay + close button), DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogClose.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Wraps @radix-ui/react-toast. Requires ToastProvider mounted once near the app root — it renders both the Radix Provider AND Viewport for you. Render individual Toast elements (controlled via your own open state or a toast-management hook) anywhere inside it.
components.setup: Mount <ToastProvider> once (e.g. in your app shell). It renders <ToastPrimitive.Viewport> internally, fixed to the bottom-right. Do not render a separate Viewport.
components.example:
<ToastProvider>
  {/* app content */}
  <Toast open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen} variant="success">
    <ToastTitle>Saved</ToastTitle>
    <ToastDescription>Your changes were saved.</ToastDescription>
    <ToastAction altText="Undo" asChild><button>Undo</button></ToastAction>
  </Toast>
</ToastProvider>

components.name: Card
components.description: Simple container. Exports Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Feedback-token-driven callout with an icon + title + description slot. role="alert".

props.name: icon
props.description: Set to false to hide the leading variant icon.

components.example: <Alert variant="error" title="Something went wrong">Please try again.</Alert>
